versions.version_description: Complete and well aligned chord sheet / thoroughly ear-transcribed.
Many of the submissions were wrong. I listened carefully to each harmony and have it correct.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Chords used: [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

At several points in the song, the instrumental pauses and he sings a line a capella. 
I've notated that as: [stop]
